journal_entry.description: Purchase land and building for warehouse, partial payment with sales tax on building
journal_entry.rationale: Land and building are acquired for $9,000,000 total. Fair values are $8M (land) and $4M (building), totaling $12M. Purchase price is allocated proportionally: land = $9M × (8/12) = $6M; building = $9M × (4/12) = $3M. Sales tax of 10% applies only to the building component: $3M × 10% = $300K. Total consideration is $9,300,000. Payment: 50% of purchase price ($4.5M) is due in 6 months (accounts payable), and the balance of $4.5M plus $300K tax = $4.8M is paid by cheque.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Land and building acquired for $9M (allocated 2:1 based on fair values of $8M:$4M = $6M land, $3M building). Sales tax of 10% on building ($300K) is recoverable HST. Payment split: $4.5M deferred (liability), $4.8M paid by cheque (cash out).
